name: create_effect_style
description: Create a new local effect style (drop shadow, inner shadow, or blur).

color.description: Shadow color as hex e.g. #000000 (default #000000, shadows only)

offsetX.description: Shadow X offset in pixels (default 0, shadows only)

offsetY.description: Shadow Y offset in pixels (default 4, shadows only)

radius.description: Blur radius in pixels (default 8 for shadows, 4 for blurs)

spread.description: Shadow spread in pixels (default 0, shadows only)

type.description: Effect type: DROP_SHADOW (default), INNER_SHADOW, LAYER_BLUR, or BACKGROUND_BLUR
